message:
feat(abi): add system, putenv, popen, pclose POSIX symbols

Implement four commonly-needed POSIX functions:
- system(): fork+exec /bin/sh -c via raw syscalls
- putenv(): parse NAME=value and delegate to setenv/unsetenv
- popen()/pclose(): pipe+fork+exec with POPEN_PIDS registry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
